subject: Dynamo template matching with flat values
body:
Dear all,

We performed template matching with Dynamo, and it picked many particles.
However, when we wanted to see how the particles looked, it only showed
black boxes (sometimes black boxes with a few white pixels) and complained
that "Cannot adjust contrast: flat value detected." I did template matching
with Warp tomogram before, and it was okay. This time, I used the imod
reconstructed tomogram and inverted contrast with the imac terminal (the
initial contrast value was (-128, 127), and I inverted it to (255,0) to
have a nice view. Could anyone suggest how to deal with this? Thank you in
advance.

Please see the screenshots attached.

Best regards,

Peng

-- 
Dr. Peng Liu

   Max-Planck-Institut für biophysikalische Chemie
   Am Faßberg 11, 37077 Göttingen
   Germany

    : +49(0)17635209768
   Email: peng.liu@mpibpc.mpg.de
